mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_conversation_folder ( id, user_id, name, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_conversation_folder WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, updated_at DESC, id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, name, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_conversation_folder WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
